title: Penetration Testers
description: Evaluate network system security by conducting simulated internal and external cyberattacks using adversary tools and techniques. Attempt to breach and exploit critical systems and gain access to sensitive information to assess system security.

tasks.text: Assess the physical security of servers, systems, or network devices to identify vulnerability to temperature, vandalism, or natural disasters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Collect stakeholder data to evaluate risk and to develop mitigation strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct network and security system audits, using established criteria.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Configure information systems to incorporate principles of least functionality and least access.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design security solutions to address known device vulnerabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and execute tests that simulate the techniques of known cyber threat actors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop infiltration tests that exploit device vulnerabilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop presentations on threat intelligence.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop security penetration testing processes, such as wireless, data networks, and telecommunication security tests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Discuss security solutions with information technology teams or management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document penetration test findings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate vulnerability assessments of local computing environments, networks, infrastructures, or enclave boundaries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Gather cyber intelligence to identify vulnerabilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify new threat tactics, techniques, or procedures used by cyber threat actors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify security system weaknesses, using penetration tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate security incidents, using computer forensics, network forensics, root cause analysis, or malware analysis.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep up with new penetration testing tools and methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain up-to-date knowledge of hacking trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit reports describing the results of security fixes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test the security of systems by attempting to gain access to networks, Web-based applications, or computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Update corporate policies to improve cyber security.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write audit reports to communicate technical and procedural findings and recommend solutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
